calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR ORDER INSTRUCTING CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for an order instructing the clerk to enter default and default judgment is denied without prejudice. Moving party provides no evidence that it has included a venue declaration with its packet. In addition, moving party does not address its failure to provide an attorney name and bar number on the proof of service of summons. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
